name: activity-inbox
summary: In-app notification feed: notifications table + RLS, unread badge, mark-read, realtime arrival, list hook + screen stub.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_notifications.sql (owner-scoped read; actor-stamped insert; realtime)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Create a notification with notify(targetUserId, type, body, entity?) when something happens (a like, a follow).
Pairs with push-notifications: push DELIVERS the buzz, this SHOWS the history.
Replace src/features/inbox/ui/inbox-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
